title: AnalysisRequest
description: Request from V7 runtime to the policy engine for a trade analysis decision on a given symbol at a point in time.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this analysis request, assigned by the caller.

mode.description: The trading mode this request operates under.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp at which the request was generated.

requested_trade_mode.description: The trade mode requested for analysis (redundant with 'mode' for routing clarity).

model_scope.description: Identifier for the model scope or alpha candidate to use, e.g. 'swing_v1', 'scalp_xgb_002'.

caller.description: Component that issued the request, e.g. 'v7_runtime', 'replay_tool'.

raw_signal.description: Optional raw signal payload from upstream signal sources (alphaforge, external adapter, etc.).
